battleTraits.name: Shadowmasked
battleTraits.timing: Once Per Turn, Any Charge Phase
battleTraits.declare: Pick a friendly INFANTRY unit that is in combat and did not charge this turn to be the target.
battleTraits.effect: Subtract 1 from hit rolls and wound rolls for combat attacks that target that friendly unit for the rest of the turn.

enhancements.name: Shadow Avatar
enhancements.timing: Once Per Battle, Your Combat Phase
enhancements.effect: Add 1 to the Rend characteristic of your general's melee weapons for the rest of the turn.

enhancements.name: Frenzied Exhortations
enhancements.declare: Pick a visible friendly unit wholly within 12" of your general to be the target.
enhancements.effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, add 1 to ward rolls for the target for the rest of the turn.

enhancements.name: Boiling Blood
enhancements.declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 12" of your general to be the target.
enhancements.effect: Roll a dice. If the roll equals or exceeds the target's Save characteristic, halve the target's Move characteristic until the start of your next turn.

enhancements.name: Bladed Impact
enhancements.declare: If your general charged this phase, pick an enemy unit within 1" of them to be the target.
enhancements.effect: Roll a D3. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.

regimentAbilities.name: Bleed Them Pale
regimentAbilities.timing: Once Per Battle, Any Combat Phase
regimentAbilities.declare: Pick a friendly INFANTRY unit that is in combat and did not charge this turn to be the target.
regimentAbilities.effect: The target can move 6" but cannot end that move in combat.

regimentAbilities.name: Murderous Strike
regimentAbilities.effect: Add 1 to the Rend characteristic of melee weapons used by friendly INFANTRY units that charged in the same turn.

units.name: Slaughter Queen on Cauldron of Blood

abilities.name: Consecrated Revulsion
abilities.declare: Pick a visible friendly INFANTRY unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.
abilities.effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, add 1 to save rolls for the target until the start of your next turn.

abilities.name: Bloody Incitement
abilities.declare: Pick a visible friendly unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.
abilities.effect: If this unit is in combat, the target's melee weapons have Crit (Auto-wound) for the rest of the turn. If this unit is not in combat, roll a dice. On a 3+, the target's melee weapons have Crit (Auto-wound) for the rest of the turn.

abilities.name: Exsanguinating Glare
abilities.declare: If this unit is in combat, pick an enemy unit in combat with it to be the target. Otherwise, pick a visible enemy unit within 12" of it to be the target.
abilities.effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target. Then, if any enemy models were slain by that mortal damage, inflict an additional 1 mortal damage on the target.

abilities.name: Dance of Death
abilities.timing: Once Per Turn (Army), Enemy Combat Phase
abilities.effect: If this unit is in combat, it can move 2D6". It can move through the combat ranges of enemy units but must end that move in combat.

abilities.name: Dance of Death
abilities.timing: Once Per Turn (Army), Enemy Combat Phase
abilities.effect: If this unit is in combat, it can move 2D6". It can move through the combat ranges of enemy units but must end that move in combat.

abilities.name: Shadow Leap
abilities.timing: Once Per Battle, Your Movement Phase
abilities.effect: Remove this unit from the battlefield and set it up again on the battlefield more than 6" from all enemy units.
